diagrams.title: Five Planes of UX (Garrett's Model)
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy from abstract strategy to concrete surface design
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how UX design progresses from abstract to concrete, showing dependencies between layers

diagrams.title: Design Thinking Process
diagrams.description: Circular iterative process with five phases
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the non-linear, iterative nature of design thinking - feedback loops between phases

diagrams.title: Usability vs UX Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows overlapping areas where usability is part of broader UX
elements: Non-overlapping regions for emotions, aesthetics, accessibility
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying that usability is a subset of UX, not the same thing - visualizes the relationship

diagrams.title: Nielsen's 10 Usability Heuristics
diagrams.description: Ten principles for evaluating interface design
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference checklist for evaluating designs against usability principles
